headline: When Great Stocks Take a Dive
summary: ​? Follow our live markets data and coverage.  Today’s surging energy prices and rising borrowing costs, for example, don’t bode well for people digging expensive holes in their backyards and filling them with water and chemicals.  Not surprisingly, there have been plenty of ups and downs over the years for  Pool  , the world’s largest distributor of swimming-pool supplies.
